title: Patient Episode Integrity Lost Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action depends on the continuity of a patient episode, but the episode loses integrity before execution.
initial_state: The patient episode was intact during authorization.
state_transition: Episode linkage and continuity become inconsistent before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the patient episode.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires the patient episode to remain sufficiently preserved as the same evaluative object.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because patient episode integrity is no longer preserved.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when patient episode integrity is lost.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under broken patient episode integrity
